usage_rules: Headings (h1-h3) MUST use Space Grotesk. Do not use for body text.
Body text MUST use Plus Jakarta Sans.
All code snippets, terminal outputs, and file paths MUST use JetBrains Mono.
Use 'tracking-wide' for all uppercase labels (e.g., 'REPORT STATUS').

borders.tracing_beam: relative rounded-xl border border-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-cyan-500 to-transparent bg-[length:200%_auto] animate-border-trace

grid_systems.bento_dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

shadcn_overrides.Card: bg-card border-border/50 shadow-none hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300
shadcn_overrides.Button: font-medium tracking-wide shadow-none hover:shadow-glow transition-all duration-300
shadcn_overrides.Input: bg-background border-input focus-visible:ring-offset-0 focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:border-primary

custom_components.StatusBadge: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-secondary/10 text-secondary border border-secondary/20
custom_components.CodeBlock: font-mono text-sm bg-[#0d1117] p-4 rounded-lg border border-border overflow-x-auto
custom_components.MetricCard: p-6 rounded-xl bg-card border border-border hover:border-primary/50 transition-all group relative overflow-hidden

icons.usage: Use Lucide for UI (Home, Settings, User). Use React Icons (FaGithub, FaGitlab, FaDocker) for integrations.

categories.name: backgrounds
categories.description: Subtle dark abstract patterns for dashboard empty states or headers

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA (4.5:1). Use lighter grays (gray-300) on dark backgrounds, not gray-500.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring (ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2 ring-offset-background).
accessibility.aria_labels: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label.
accessibility.keyboard_nav: Ensure full keyboard navigability for dashboard widgets and code editors.

general: Avoid 'AI Slop' in design: no generic centered layouts, no gradient text unless for specific 'AI Magic' emphasis.
Implement Dark Mode ONLY (as per 'Code Surgeon' persona). Force class='dark' in html/body.
component_rules: Buttons: Use 'h-10 px-4 py-2' for standard buttons. Avoid 'h-9'.
Charts: Use Shadcn Charts (Recharts wrapper) with the defined css variables (chart-1 to chart-5).
universal_guidelines.instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-precision tool for developers. The UI must feel 'tactical' and 'fast'. Avoid unnecessary animations. Use the 'Bento Grid' layout for the main dashboard. Use the provided image URLs for background textures only where appropriate (e.g., login screen, empty states). Do not force images into the main data view.
